weeknumber 1.0
  • Reference

Coerce to week number class

Source: R/cast.R
as_weeknumber.Rd

Coerce an object to a weeknumber vector.

Usage

as_weeknumber(x)

Arguments

x

An object.

Value

A weeknumber vector.

Details

Convert numbers, ISO week strings like "2000-W01", factors, and date-time objects to weeknumber values.

Examples

as_weeknumber(c(-1:1, 51:52, NA))
#> <weeknumber[6]>
#> [1] 1999-W52 2000-W01 2000-W02 2000-W52 2001-W01 <NA>    
as_weeknumber("2000-W01")
#> <weeknumber[1]>
#> [1] 2000-W01
as_weeknumber(as.Date("2000-12-28"))
#> <weeknumber[1]>
#> [1] 2000-W52
